# Packaged third-party notice sources

These notice files are vendored so a package build does not fetch mutable legal
text from the network. Update them only with the corresponding locked dependency
and review the source commit and SHA-256 together.

| File | Locked source | SHA-256 |
|---|---|---|
| `Avalonia-LICENSE.txt` | Avalonia 12.1.0 NuGet MIT expression and copyright metadata | `d983e7bf294f9770bfcf7695466cad5c126e497653a0594499f388c8e4a49eb6` |
| `Avalonia-NOTICE.md` | Avalonia commit `a21b9f573172f705a944dcc8aad7f036b9986f39` | `dd6f80852d16320c865a2e403ffd1a8b07a0e34c5b37122c0bc2343639ff68e6` |
| `MicroCom-LICENSE.txt` | MicroCom commit `76785efcafd91b5902fd19dd11145f6dd655b7b4` | `6ee769c9ac4dac9abb16b98b1341e9528ff9f4ab685481410d3376d14148f3a9` |
| `Tmds.DBus.Protocol-LICENSE.txt` | Tmds.DBus commit `b4a7fed0b878f74cb54f7cca84d2889af4e596ba` (final newline added) | `d7cca2dc9211a140ce3e1dbfd90ac911d49268b5ddc2162a06a79ea85d1d67f1` |
| `SkiaSharp-HarfBuzzSharp-LICENSE.txt` | SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux 3.119.4 and HarfBuzzSharp.NativeAssets.Linux 8.3.1.3 (byte-identical package file, normalized to LF) | `bc2eb4f37d574f9b1b67da2b17e14d151618850527d78f7323239e7518df5b77` |
| `SkiaSharp-HarfBuzzSharp-THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.txt` | same two locked native packages (byte-identical package file, normalized to LF) | `98acf9d4d6083959988c884f630cdff760f94bfeb9acf57774653e08c23d1e45` |
| `Inter-OFL.txt` | Inter commit `353b61b9f4430d5f420d56605a6e7993e0941470` | `262481e844521b326f5ecd053e59b98c8b2da78c8ee1bdbb6e8174305e54935a` |
